completion: A fresh operator can read one situation output and know current state, blockers, stale-tool uncertainty and the next allowed grip.
Grip list/run exposes small receipt-bound intents instead of the full tool drawer.
Repeated friction produces proposal-only next-grip or next-task recommendations.
Operator recall is evidence-bound and cannot replace receipts, reviews or Bureau completion.
Measured friction evidence can shape only bounded low- and medium-risk execution choices after shadow evaluation, while high-impact gates remain immutable.
Equivalent durable work is deduplicated only under exact input and freshness identity, and concurrent validation state is isolated.
Durable job and session capability slices are registered but remain gated behind reliable read-side evidence.
goal: Reduce Grabowski operator decision entropy by adding a read-only situation spine, a small intent-shaped grip surface, friction feedback, evidence-bound recall, adaptive low-risk execution shaping, durable jobs and enforceable session attenuation.

metadata.adaptive_agent_bootstrap_t033_20260711: T033 verified through Grabowski PR #160 and deployed at 2cede6b4d5f9b73828ed7dfb44f24e1da5753f62. It adds a proposal-only session bootstrap and deterministic call-shape linter.
metadata.adaptive_friction_followup_20260711: T031 registers a shadow-first friction-aware execution governor and T032 registers exact-identity work deduplication plus validation-state isolation from a live audit of 63 friction events, 48 unresolved events and repeated concurrent validation interference.
metadata.priority_decision: situation spine before recall; grip surface before friction automation; shadow measurement before bounded adaptive routing; push and capability enforcement later

relationship_to_existing.GRIP-ROADMAP-V1: complements and narrows operator-facing work; does not replace queued grip roadmap tasks
relationship_to_existing.docs/grabowski-restplan-v2.md: reuses capability-profile direction and converts it into task-shaped follow-up

metadata.rootbroker_recovery_freshness_followup_2: T030 records the reproduced contradiction between recovery_status ready=true and immediate Rootbroker stale-marker denial. It is blocked while another owner holds the Grabowski repository.
metadata.source_summary: User asked to turn the Grabowski operator-surface ideas into a Bureau plan after review of situation, grips, frozen snapshots, friction loop, push jobs, episodic memory and session attenuation.
